overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime exploration of a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character walks from a foggy waterfront promenade up concrete stairs, crosses wet city streets with light traffic, and enters a plaza featuring reflective water pools and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, passing illuminated vending machines on the left

entered.detail: metal railing separating the walkway from the water below
tall industrial tower with multiple bright lights at the top, visible through fog
row of illuminated red and purple vending machines with advertisements
tall cylindrical light fixture casting warm yellow light
teal and purple neon illumination on distant glass buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a waterfront promenade. The camera moves forward past a row of brightly lit vending machines on the left, with a metal railing on the right overlooking dark water. In the distance, a tall industrial tower with multiple lights pierces through the haze, while vertical light posts illuminate the wet concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to street level

events.description: turns left and begins ascending wide concrete stairs with orange railings
continues climbing stairs approaching the street level above

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs to reach the upper street level

entered.detail: wide set of concrete stairs leading upward
bright orange metal railing with diagonal stripes along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and ascends a wide concrete staircase with bright orange safety railings. The environment transitions from the open waterfront to a more enclosed stairwell, with the foggy night sky still visible above. Glass buildings with teal neon accents become visible at the top of the stairs.

events.description: exits stairs onto street level with glass buildings and neon signs visible
vehicles drive through the wet intersection ahead
turns right while crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wet city streets, moving through crosswalks and avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the intersection
person walking on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
large illuminated advertisements on building facades
tall modern street lamps with horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection surrounded by glass office towers with teal and purple neon lighting. The camera crosses yellow-striped crosswalks on the wet asphalt, navigating around sparse vehicle traffic. The foggy atmosphere diffuses the bright neon signs and streetlights reflecting off the rain-slicked streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with reflective water pools

events.description: enters plaza area featuring water features and neon-lit benches
passes close by a seated person on a concrete bench

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing the neon-lit environment and water features

notable_agents.action: woman sitting on bench looking at her phone

entered.detail: rectangular pool of still water reflecting the neon lights above
modern concrete seating along the water feature
overhead structure with purple neon lighting
floating digital billboards displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The character enters a modern urban plaza featuring a central water pool that reflects the surrounding neon lights. The ground transitions to paved tiles, and concrete benches line the walkway. A woman sits on a bench to the right as the camera passes, while holographic advertisements and a purple-lit canopy structure become visible ahead.

events.description: passing holographic displays floating over the water feature
turns left around the water feature continuing through the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past holographic advertisements and reflective pools

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the plaza pathway

entered.detail: blue translucent holographic figure floating above the water
upper level walkway with glass railings connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the camera passes blue holographic displays floating above the water pools. The environment features elevated walkways connecting the surrounding glass towers, with neon signs reflecting in the still water. The character turns left around the water feature, continuing through the neon-lit pedestrian area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a hazy waterfront promenade into the neon-drenched heart of a futuristic urban intersection. It begins by gliding past brightly lit vending machines and a metal railing overlooking dark water, with a distant industrial tower piercing through the thick fog. As the camera turns left, the open promenade gives way to a wide concrete staircase with orange safety railings, ascending toward glass buildings accented with teal neon. The scene then opens into a sprawling city intersection where the camera crosses yellow-striped crosswalks on wet asphalt, navigating around sparse vehicle traffic. Finally, the atmosphere shifts as the fog diffuses the glow of purple and teal neon signs reflecting off the rain-slicked streets between towering office buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern urban plaza that deepens into a dense corridor of neon lights and holographic displays. It begins as the camera enters the plaza, transitioning from the street to paved tiles and passing a woman seated on a concrete bench. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens up to reveal a central water pool reflecting the surrounding glow and a purple-lit canopy structure ahead. The scene then shifts deeper into the plaza, gliding past blue holographic displays floating above the water while elevated walkways and glass towers loom overhead. Finally, the camera turns left around the water feature, continuing its progression through the vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian area.
